title: Validate Numeric Characters in Password

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is creating a new account
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a password with at least one numeric character
acceptance_criteria.then: The system accepts the password and proceeds with the account creation

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is creating a new account
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a password without any numeric characters
acceptance_criteria.then: The system displays an error message indicating that the password must contain at least one numeric character

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is creating a new account
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a password with only numeric characters
acceptance_criteria.then: The system accepts the password and proceeds with the account creation

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is updating their existing password
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a new password with at least one numeric character
acceptance_criteria.then: The system updates the password and displays a success message

user_story: As a user, I want to ensure my password contains numeric characters, So that I can enhance the security of my account

risks.description: Password cracking due to weak password policy
Inconsistent password validation across different platforms
Password validation issues with third-party authentication services

test_cases.title: Happy Path - Password with Numeric Characters
steps: Create a new account
Enter a password with at least one numeric character
Submit the account creation form
test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the password and creates the account

test_cases.title: Negative Case - Password without Numeric Characters
steps: Create a new account
Enter a password without any numeric characters
Submit the account creation form
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating that the password must contain at least one numeric character

test_cases.title: Edge Case - Password with Only Numeric Characters
steps: Create a new account
Enter a password with only numeric characters
Submit the account creation form
test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the password and creates the account

test_cases.title: Alternative Flow - Update Password with Numeric Characters
steps: Log in to an existing account
Update the password with a new password containing at least one numeric character
Submit the password update form
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Concurrency Scenario - Multiple Password Updates
steps: Log in to an existing account
Update the password with a new password containing at least one numeric character
Immediately update the password again with another new password containing at least one numeric character
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password correctly and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Password with Special Characters
steps: Given The user is creating a new account
When The user enters a password with at least one numeric character and at least one special character
Then The system accepts the password and proceeds with the account creation
test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the password and proceeds with the account creation

test_cases.title: Password with Numeric Characters and Special Characters
steps: Create a password with numeric characters and special characters (e.g., abc123!)
Submit the password for validation
test_cases.expected_result: The password should be valid despite containing both numeric characters and special characters.
